title: Isometric City Builder Scene
desc: Generate modular city-builder assets and hero scenes with readable zoning and lighting.
prompt_template: Create an isometric {city_theme} district with {landmarks}. Render in {render_style} with {time_of_day} lighting. Emphasize modular blocks, traffic hints, and readable zoning colors.
author: game-art-pack
final_prompt: Create an isometric coastal cyberpunk district with floating tram station, vertical farms, and compact market roofs. Render in hand-painted stylized 3D with golden dusk lighting. Emphasize modular blocks, traffic hints, and readable zoning colors.
